source_intake_record.raw_question_text: An open feedwater heater in a power plant heats 4 kg/s water at 45\circ\text{C}, 100 kPa by mixing it with steam from the turbine at 100 kPa, 250\circ\text{C}. Assume the exit flow is saturated liquid at the given pressure and find the mass flow rate from the turbine.
